name: Agriculture and Food
blurb: Supports B.C.'s farmers, ranchers and food producers — farm business supports, food security, agricultural land use, and the growth of sustainable local food systems.

name: Attorney General
blurb: Provides legal services to government, oversees the justice system and courts administration, and protects rights through legal aid, human rights, and family justice services.

name: Children and Family Development
blurb: Supports vulnerable children, youth and families — child protection, foster care and adoption, youth services, and services for children and youth with support needs.

name: Citizens' Services
blurb: Delivers government services to people and businesses through Service BC, manages government digital services, data, procurement, and connectivity across the province.

name: Education and Child Care
blurb: Leads B.C.'s K-12 public and independent school systems and the child care sector — from StrongStartBC early learning through graduation.

name: Emergency Management and Climate Readiness
blurb: Leads provincial preparedness, response and recovery for emergencies and disasters — floods, wildfires, earthquakes — and builds climate readiness across communities.

name: Energy and Climate Solutions
blurb: Leads B.C.'s energy policy and climate action — clean electricity, energy efficiency, low-carbon fuels, and the CleanBC plan.

name: Environment and Parks
blurb: Protects B.C.'s environment — environmental assessments, permitting and compliance, waste and recycling, and the BC Parks system.

name: Finance
blurb: Manages the province's finances — budget, taxation, public sector employer policy — and regulates financial services, real estate, and gambling policy.

name: Forests
blurb: Stewards B.C.'s forest and range lands — timber tenures and pricing, wildfire management through BC Wildfire Service, and forest health and silviculture.

name: Health
blurb: Funds and oversees B.C.'s health system — MSP coverage, hospitals and health authorities, PharmaCare, primary care, public health, and seniors' care.

name: Housing and Municipal Affairs
blurb: Leads housing supply and affordability — residential tenancy, BC Housing programs, building codes — and supports local governments across B.C.

name: Indigenous Relations and Reconciliation
blurb: Leads reconciliation with Indigenous Peoples — implementing the Declaration Act, negotiating treaties and agreements, and supporting Indigenous communities.

name: Infrastructure
blurb: Plans and delivers major public infrastructure — schools, hospitals, and other government capital projects across the province.

name: Jobs and Economic Growth
blurb: Grows B.C.'s economy — business supports, trade and investment attraction, small business services, and regional economic development.

name: Labour
blurb: Protects workers and supports fair workplaces — employment standards, workers' compensation policy, and labour relations.

name: Mining and Critical Minerals
blurb: Oversees B.C.'s mining sector — mineral titles, mine permitting and oversight, and growth of the critical minerals economy.

name: Post-Secondary Education and Future Skills
blurb: Oversees universities, colleges and skills training — StudentAid BC, apprenticeship through SkilledTradesBC, and workforce readiness.

name: Public Safety and Solicitor General
blurb: Keeps communities safe — policing and law enforcement oversight, corrections, victim services, road safety, and liquor, cannabis and gambling enforcement.

name: Social Development and Poverty Reduction
blurb: Supports people in need — income and disability assistance, employment supports through WorkBC, accessibility, and poverty reduction.

name: Tourism, Arts, Culture and Sport
blurb: Champions B.C.'s tourism industry, arts and creative sector, multiculturalism and anti-racism, and amateur sport.

name: Transportation and Transit
blurb: Plans and maintains B.C.'s transportation network — highways, bridges, public transit, BC Ferries oversight, and commercial vehicle safety.

name: Water, Land and Resource Stewardship
blurb: Stewards B.C.'s water, land and natural resources — water licensing, Crown land authorizations, fish and wildlife, and land use planning.
